revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Example/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Example/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Example/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Example/doc]]</includeonly>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Example/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Example/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Example/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Example/doc]]</includeonly>

<!-- The next two lines set one short description for the template and another for the /doc page. Replacing them with a single {{short description}} would use that for both pages. --> 
<noinclude>{{Short description|Example of a documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{Short description|Example of a template}}</includeonly>
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
{{distinguish|Template:Example needed}}
:''To give an example of how to use a template, use {{tl|demo}}.''
{{Not a sandbox}}
{{Uses TemplateStyles}}

==Usage==
If this were a real template, the documentation would go here, along with a few examples on how to use it. Some templates keep this documentation on a separate page; see [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] for details.

{{Example needed}}

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "Example template that creates a small box saying it is an example.",
	"params": {}
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
[[Category:Namespace example pages|Template]]
[[Category:Template documentation]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<!-- The next two lines set one short description for the template and another for the /doc page. Replacing them with a single {{short description}} would use that for both pages. --> 
<noinclude>{{Short description|Example of a documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{Short description|Example of a template}}</includeonly>
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
{{distinguish|Template:Example needed}}
:''To give an example of how to use a template, use {{tl|demo}}.''
{{Not a sandbox}}
{{Uses TemplateStyles}}

==Usage==
If this were a real template, the documentation would go here, along with a few examples on how to use it. Some templates keep this documentation on a separate page; see [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] for details.

{{Example needed}}

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "Example template that creates a small box saying it is an example.",
	"params": {}
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
[[Category:Namespace example pages|Template]]
[[Category:Template documentation]]
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- The next two lines set one short description for the template and another for the /doc page. Replacing them with a single {{short description}} would use that for both pages. -->

<includeonly>{{Short description|Example of a template}}</includeonly>
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->

If this were a real template, the documentation would go here, along with a few examples on how to use it. Some templates keep this documentation on a separate page; see [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] for details.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "Example template that creates a small box saying it is an example.",
	"params": {}
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Namespace example pages|Template]]
[[Category:Template documentation]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Example%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

<noinclude>{{Short description|Example of a documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{Short description|Example of a template}}</includeonly>
{{Documentation subpage}}

{{distinguish|Template:Example needed}}
:''To give an example of how to use a template, use {{tl|demo}}.''
{{Not a sandbox}}
{{Uses TemplateStyles}}

==Usage==
If this were a real template, the documentation would go here, along with a few examples on how to use it. Some templates keep this documentation on a separate page; see [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] for details.

{{Example needed}}

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "Example template that creates a small box saying it is an example.",
	"params": {}
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Namespace example pages|Template]]
[[Category:Template documentation]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
